title: rubus × jactuosiformis
intro: Rubus × jactuosiformis, a hybrid species of raspberry, is a type of bramble that is known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Rubus × jactuosiformis include its ability to act as an antioxidant, protect against oxidative stress, and support immune function. Rubus × jactuosiformis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
